Workshop.title: Workshop
Workshop.description: Represents a mechanic workshop registered in the application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Workshop entity.

description.description: A brief description of the workshop and its specialties.

latitude.description: Latitude coordinate of the workshop's location.

longitude.description: Longitude coordinate of the workshop's location.

services.description: List of services offered by the workshop.

obdIiScannerService.description: Indicates whether the workshop offers OBDII scanner services.

ownerId.description: Reference to UserProfile representing the workshop owner. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Workshop)

UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user profile in the application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

Appointment.title: Appointment
Appointment.description: Represents an appointment booked by a user at a workshop.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Appointment entity.

appointmentDateTime.description: Date and time of the appointment.

serviceType.description: Type of service requested for the appointment (e.g., general repair, OBDII scan).

notes.description: Additional notes or details for the appointment.

status.description: Status of the appointment (e.g., booked, confirmed, completed, cancelled).

ObdCode.title: ObdCode
ObdCode.description: Represents an OBDII error code and its potential causes and solutions.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ObdCode entity.

description.description: A description of what the error code means.

possibleCauses.description: A list of possible causes for the error code.

commonSolutions.description: A list of common solutions to resolve the error code.

additionalNotes.description: Additional notes or relevant information about the error code.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profile information. Path-based ownership enables simple security rules.

/workshops/{workshopId}.description: Stores workshop information, including ownerId for access control. No denormalized authorization data is needed as the `ownerId` is present. Enables listing all workshops.

/appointments/{appointmentId}.description: Stores appointment information, including userId and workshopId. This setup facilitates queries by user or workshop. Enables listing all appointments.

/obd_codes/{obdCodeId}.description: Stores OBDII error codes and related information. Accessible by all users.

/marketplace/{vehicleId}.description: Publicly readable collection of vehicles for sale. This collection should be populated by a backend process that mirrors documents from the private `users/{userId}/vehicles` collection when `isForSale` is true.
